case_title: LERNER, TAMBOR BLACK INC VS MR. NUNEZ G 4 M COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MR. NUNEZ G 4 M COMPANY HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LERNER, TAMBOR BLACK INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MR. NUNEZ G 4 M COMPANY $2,665.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,723.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
